texts.full_text: States Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit on October 6th, 1985. The docket number cited at "788 F.2d" refers typically to an appeal case in which this figure signifies that judgment was issued or arguments heard during its term, marking Volume 7882 and page(s) within a specific issue of reported cases pertaining potentially under the Federal Rules of Appellate Procedure (FRAP). It's worth noting such legal decisions have substantial impact on U.S. law particularly when they involve interpretations/establishments by appellant courts or federal circuits which can affect policy, precedent, statutes interpretation and future court rulings. If you need further detail about this case, it would be to contact the United States Court of Appeals for their official records or refer to legal databases like LexisNexis (for a Public Access
